Challenge
Abyssal Flower Ring

Once in a while, the unit launches jelly missiles at 2 random enemies. On hit, the missiles cover the targets with jelly for 3 sec. During this time, they cannot attack or move and take 40% more damage. When the ability wears off, the jelly explodes and sticks to 2 nearest enemies for 3 sec. Their attack speed is reduced by 25% and they have a 50% chance to miss their target on attack. On hit, the missiles also deal 160000 magic damage. If the target has more than 50% health left after it was hit by a missile, it takes additional magic damage equal to 15% of its max health.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
